name: magicfloatingtabnav
title: Magic Floating Tab Nav
description: A "God-Tier" Floating Navigation Bar. Features: - Wrapping Bubble Geometry: High-elasticity highlight that encases the active icon. - Active Reveal Labels: Minimalist aesthetic where labels only appear for the selected tab. - Chromatic Underglow: Adaptive ambient lighting that changes to match the selected icon. - Spatial Audio: Synchronized liquid-slide feedback on transitions.
